NSCameraUsageDescription: ULink needs camera access to take photos for posts, avatars, and messages.
NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ULink needs photo library access to select images for posts, avatars, and messages.
NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: ULink needs microphone access to record voice messages.
NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: ULink needs speech recognition access to convert voice to text.
